description: Taylor Johnson discusses building compliant on-chain products, focusing on tokenization on Solana and the differences between the original token program and token 2022. He emphasizes the importance of robust access control and KYC processes for compliance.
topic_summary: In this talk, Taylor Johnson provides insights into tokenization on Solana, explaining the functionalities of the original token program and token 2022, and discusses the significance of KYC and access control in on-chain compliance [t=1:92-280:36].
